title: stachys recta var. fragilis
intro: Stachys recta var. fragilis, also known as fragrant betony, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate pain, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions, including wounds, digestive issues, and anxiety. Fragrant betony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
